waitlistAutoReg: You'll be automatically registered if a spot opens up. We'll contact you at your email.
checkEmail: Check your email for confirmation details.
completeAdditionalInfo: Please complete the following information to finish your registration.
allDone: All done — we look forward to seeing you.
reserveItemsNow: Reserve items now — collect and pay at the Pro Shop on event day.
agreeToRules: By registering you agree to the tournament rules and code of conduct.
membersOnlyNote: This tournament is open to club members only. You'll need a valid membership to register.
tournamentFullWaitlist: This tournament is full — you can join the waitlist below and will be auto-promoted if a spot opens.
tournamentFullMembersWaitlist: This tournament is full — you can join the waitlist if you are a club member.
availableAtProShop: Available at the Pro Shop on event day.

errors.requiredFields: First name, last name, and email are required
errors.membersOnly: This tournament is open to club members only. Please contact the club to link your membership, or sign in to the Player Portal.
errors.anError: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.failedToSubmit: Failed to submit. Please try again.
errors.couldNotCreateOrder: Could not create payment order. Please try again.
errors.paymentVerificationFailed: Payment verification failed. Please contact support.

publicForm.submittedDesc: Your additional details have been recorded. We look forward to seeing you at the event.

publicForm.fileUploadNote: File upload preview only — files will be submitted with your form.
